Animated Layer Preview

This assembles boss body sprites, mounted turret sprites, and mounted spawner sprites from their source position, image offset, scale, angle, and layer order. Rotating parts use their source rotationSpeed. 16 of 16 sprite parts rendered / 2 body / 13 turret / 1 spawner.

These are the visual parts used in the assembled preview, including basicObjs, mounted turrets, and mounted spawners when the cache exposes their sprites.
